name: Women's Shiny Plastic Square Way Sunglasses - Universal Thread™ Olive Green: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection
description:
Add classy colors to your accessories collection with the Shiny Plastic Square Way Sunglasses from Universal Thread™. These square sunglasses feature an olive green frame with gray lenses for an appealing contrast. The lenses have a UV protection feature to help keep your eyes shielded from harmful sun rays. Made of 100% recycled plastic frame for a lightweight feel, these shiny olive green sunglasses fit medium faces.

Universal Thread™: Found exclusively at Target.
